name: bundler
title: bundler
description:
Manage Ruby application dependencies
Bundler manages a Ruby application's dependencies through its entire
life, across many machines, systematically and repeatably.
.
This is a dependency package which depends on a full Ruby development
environment, it is targeted at application developers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bundler because Manage Ruby application dependencies.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bundler as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bundler with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bundler --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
